description_long: This object consists of two intricately designed axes crossed at the handles, each featuring a handle wrapped in dark material and a blade shaped like an open hand with stylized, swirling patterns. The handles are robust, slightly curved, and appear to be wrapped for improved grip, with a dark brown coloration and visible texture. The blades are unique, resembling hands with extended fingers and ornate engravings, and each has a curled, decorative flourish at the wrist. The axes are symmetrical and display a blend of functional and decorative elements, suggesting a ceremonial or symbolic purpose in addition to practical use. The surface of the blades and handles is matte with a rough, tactile finish, and the overall construction appears solid and heavy. No visible brand or manufacturer markings are present, but the craftsmanship suggests a custom or artisanal origin.
description: A pair of crossed axes with hand-shaped, engraved blades and dark, wrapped, curved handles, featuring ornate, swirling designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing both axes crossed, with full visibility of the hand-shaped blades, engraved patterns, and curled flourishes.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the axes, with the thickness of the handles and blades visible but minimal detail on engravings.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the crossed axes, hand-shaped blades, and decorative engravings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and handle curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, robust wooden handles wrapped in dark leather for grip, with an oval cross-section and ergonomic curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Blades are shaped like open hands with extended fingers, featuring swirling engravings and curled decorative flourishes at the wrist; single-edged with no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, with the blade appearing to be securely fitted onto the handle.
